response.text:
It’s still showing the eye/jitter analysis layout, and Meas 4 through Meas 8 are still visible on the right.

- Top-left: Measurement Results table with Meas 1 labeled Jitter Summary on Ref 1.
- Main upper-right: Eye Diagram (Meas 1), open eye centered around 0 s with density coloring.
- Lower-left: TIE Spectrum (Meas 1), several narrow spectral peaks.
- Upper-left middle: TIE Histogram (Meas 1), clustered near 0 ps with spread into negative time.
- Center-left: Bathtub (Meas 1), BER curves on both sides.
- Lower-right: Waveform View of Ref 1.

Right-side result cards still present:
- Frequency: μ ≈ 1.106 GHz, σ ≈ 298.4 MHz
- Meas 4: Rise Time, μ ≈ 145.4 ps
- Meas 5: Fall Time, μ ≈ 220.4 ps
- Meas 6: Amplitude, μ ≈ 744.8 mV
- Meas 7: Peak-to-Peak, μ ≈ 1.104 V
- Meas 8: Peak-to-Peak, μ ≈ 1.104 V

Bottom status:
- Ref 1, 200 mV/div
- 20 GS/s
- Horizontal 200 ns/div
- Acquisition Single

So the delete commands returned OK, but the measurement badges/cards have not disappeared from the displayed layout.
